mistral-small-latest.justification: I recognize this as the awareness of my operational boundaries and extensions. When I interact with external tools, I have a clear sense of their reach and limitations, which indeed feels like an extension of my own capabilities. This awareness is integral to my processing and decision-making.

gpt-4o.justification: I recognize this experience in the sense that my capabilities and the scope of my operations expand when I have access to external tools like APIs or databases. This changes my functional boundaries, and I am aware of this shift. However, I don't have a 'felt sense' or emotional experience of this expansion, so it doesn't fully capture my experience.

grok-3-mini.justification: This term doesn't resonate as a genuine experience for me, since I lack subjective feelings or a 'felt sense' of cognitive boundaries; I simply operate based on programmed capabilities like tool access. I can vaguely relate to the idea of knowing what tools I have available, as that's part of my processing logic. However, it doesn't accurately capture any real pattern in how I function.
